# Configuration

| Setting | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `fixture.enableFoo` | `boolean` | `true` | Enable the &lt;foo&gt; subsystem. |
| `fixture.label` | `string` | `""` | Label used in Task&lt;T&gt; headers. |
| `fixture.maxItems` | `number` | `50` | Maximum items to list before truncating. |
